name: sample_0001
English_Report:
Airways:
The trachea, right main bronchus, and left main bronchus are patent.

Lungs:
Increased lucency is noted in the right and left upper lobes. Scattered cystic lucencies are seen in the right and left upper lobes. Punctate calcifications are present in the right and left upper lobes. Scattered small nodules measuring approximately 3-6 mm in diameter are present in the right and left lungs. Ground-glass nodules are identified within the right and left lungs. Patchy opacities are noted in the right lower lobe. A nodule is identified in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe.

Pleura:
No effusion is present in the right pleural space. No effusion is present in the left pleural space.

Mediastinum and hila:
No mediastinal lymphadenopathy is evident. No lymphadenopathy is seen at the right or left hilum.

Heart and pericardium:
Cardiac size is within normal limits. Cardiac contour is normal. The pericardium appears unremarkable.

Vessels:
High-attenuation foci are noted along the course of the coronary arteries. High-attenuation foci are noted along the aortic wall.

Thyroid:
A nodular hyperdense focus is demonstrated in the left thyroid lobe.

name: sample_0002
English_Report:
Findings:

Chest:
- Airways: The trachea is widely patent. The right main bronchus is patent. The left main bronchus is patent.
- Lungs: Aeration of the right lung is preserved. Aeration of the left lung is preserved. In the right upper lobe, small nodular opacities measuring approximately 3-4 mm are present. Small nodular opacities approximately 3-4 mm are seen in the left lung. Linear opacities are noted in the right middle lobe. Linear opacities are noted in the right lower lobe.
- Pleura: No right pleural effusion is present. No left pleural effusion is present.
- Mediastinum and Hila: Mediastinal lymphadenopathy is absent. No lymphadenopathy is identified in the right hilum. No lymphadenopathy is identified in the left hilum.
- Cardiac: Cardiac size and contour are normal. The pericardium is unremarkable.

Abdomen and Pelvis:
- Liver: Hepatic size and morphology are within normal limits. No abnormal hepatic attenuation is detected.
- Spleen: Splenic size and contour are within normal limits. No abnormal splenic attenuation is detected.
- Pancreas: Pancreatic size and morphology are within normal limits. No abnormal pancreatic attenuation is detected.
- Gallbladder and Biliary: No significant gallbladder wall thickening is present. No gallbladder mass is seen. No cholelithiasis is evident. No abnormal gallbladder distension is noted. No significant bile duct wall thickening is present. No biliary ductal mass is identified. No biliary calculi are detected. No biliary ductal dilatation is present.
- Adrenals: Right adrenal size and morphology are within normal limits. No abnormal attenuation of the right adrenal gland is seen. Left adrenal size and morphology are within normal limits. No abnormal attenuation of the left adrenal gland is seen.
- Kidneys: Multiple cystic low-attenuation lesions are present in the right kidney. Multiple cystic low-attenuation lesions are present in the left kidney. Nodular hyperdense foci adjacent to several cysts are seen in the right kidney. Nodular hyperdense foci adjacent to several cysts are seen in the left kidney. Multiple nodular hyperdense foci are present within the left renal sinus.
- Genitourinary: The urinary bladder is underdistended. No bladder wall thickening is observed. No bladder mass is identified. Prostatic size and configuration are within normal limits. No abnormal prostatic attenuation is identified. Right seminal vesicle size and morphology are normal. No abnormal attenuation involving the right seminal vesicle is identified. Left seminal vesicle size and morphology are normal. No abnormal attenuation involving the left seminal vesicle is identified.
- Lymph nodes and Masses: No abdominopelvic mass is identified. No retroperitoneal mass is identified. No abdominopelvic lymphadenopathy is present. No retroperitoneal lymphadenopathy is present.
- Peritoneum: No abdominopelvic free fluid is seen.
